title: Junkyard Enhanced
description:
Modpack crafted with performance and quality in mind

(New update WIP for 1.21.x)
body:
![A title description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5805bdca658427896e4da021cabe3c39d1b1154d_0.webp)
This Minecraft modpack is meticulously crafted to elevate the semi-vanilla gameplay experience, focusing on both performance and quality. It seamlessly integrates enhancements that optimize game mechanics while preserving the core essence of Minecraft, ensuring players enjoy a smooth and immersive adventure. Ideal for those seeking to enrich their gameplay without straying too far from the original aesthetic, this modpack offers a balanced blend of innovation and familiarity.

(modpack is tailor made for our F&F survival server)
